hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today is a great day to take bold steps forward. Your energy is high, making it an auspicious time for new ventures.
aries.love: Romantic sparks could ignite unexpectedly; be open to surprises.
aries.career: Leadership opportunities may arise; be ready to take charge.

taurus.general: You might feel a bit stubborn today, but embracing flexibility could lead to unexpected rewards.
taurus.love: A heartfelt conversation with a loved one enhances your connection.
taurus.career: Persistence pays off; keep pushing for your goals.

gemini.general: Your social life is likely to blossom today; use this energy to network.
gemini.love: It's an excellent day for playful banter and light-heartedness in relationships.
gemini.career: Collaboration will spark innovative ideas; engage with your colleagues.

cancer.general: Trust your intuition today, as it will lead you to profound insights.
cancer.love: Emotional vulnerability could strengthen your bond with someone special.
cancer.career: Focus on nurturing your projects; your efforts will soon bear fruit.

leo.general: Your charisma will shine brightly today; don't shy away from the spotlight.
leo.love: Expect an exciting surprise from your partner; romance is in the air.
leo.career: Your creative ideas will capture attention; share them boldly.

virgo.general: Today is perfect for organizing your space; clarity will bring peace.
virgo.love: Good communication with your partner brings harmony.
virgo.career: Your attention to detail will enhance your work quality; trust your instincts.

libra.general: Social interactions will be rewarding; engage with friends and family.
libra.love: Harmony reigns in your romantic life; enjoy the peace.
libra.career: Balance is key in negotiations; aim for win-win scenarios.

scorpio.general: Intense emotions may surface; channel them creatively today.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations will strengthen your relationship bonds.
scorpio.career: Your determination will help you overcome any obstacles in your path.

sagittarius.general: A sense of adventure calls to you; embrace spontaneity.
sagittarius.love: New romantic prospects could appear, make sure to seize the day.
sagittarius.career: Exploring new opportunities may lead to exciting career paths.

capricorn.general: Goal setting will be powerful today; clarify your objectives.
capricorn.love: Stability in love can be achieved through honest discussions.
capricorn.career: Your hard work is appreciated; aim for recognition.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flow easily; share your vision with others.
aquarius.love: A fresh perspective in your relationship leads to deeper understanding.
aquarius.career: Networking can open new doors; embrace collaboration.

pisces.general: Creativity and imagination will be heightened today; utilize them fully.
pisces.love: A romantic date could rekindle passion in your love life.
pisces.career: Your intuitiveness will guide you through complex work challenges.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
professional.author: Walt Disney

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Life is short, so make every hair flip fabulous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
captions.author: Mae West

captions.text: Count the memories, not the calories.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It's not that we use technology, we live technology.
tech.author: Godfrey Reggio

tech.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
tech.author: Sydney Harris

tech.text: If you think technology can solve your problems, you don’t understand your problems.
tech.author: Paul Kagame

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: We are changing the world with technology.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me Kit Kat ads!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall resurrect.
faith.author: Ferdinand Foch

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is victory.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
wisdom.author: Søren Kierkegaard

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, I have come to realize that knowledge is not enough.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The wise does at once what the fool does finally.
wisdom.author: Baltasar Gracián
